name: loschmidt_m3
description: Loschmidt number used by the TFM to convert literature collision coefficients to pressure-normalised rates.

name: W_Ar_dbleStar_to_1s
description: Effective feed-down weight from Ar** into the Ar(4s) precursor family.

name: tau_Ar_dbleStar_ns
description: Effective lifetime of the upper argon cascade from the main second-continuum parameter table.

name: k_Ar_dbleStar_Q_Ar_m3_s
description: Mean Ar(4p) bimolecular coefficient from the main TFM table; also used for the effective 4s+Ar cascade step because no separate value is tabulated.

name: k_Ar_dbleStar_Q_CF4_m3_s
description: Upper-state argon quenching coefficient by CF4 from the main TFM table.

name: k_Ar_dbleStar_Q_N2_m3_s
description: Upper-state argon quenching coefficient by N2 from the main TFM table.

name: k_Ar_4s_Q_CF4_m3_s
description: Ar(4s) quenching coefficient by CF4 from the main TFM table.

name: k_Ar_4s_Q_N2_m3_s
description: Ar(4s) quenching coefficient by N2 from the main TFM table.

name: k_Ar_4s_Q_2Ar_m6_s
description: Ternary excimer-formation coefficient from the main TFM table.

name: f_1Sigma
description: Singlet excimer formation fraction used in the TFM model.

name: f_3Sigma
description: Triplet excimer formation fraction used in the TFM model.

name: k_Ar2star_Q_CF4_m3_s
description: Ar2* quenching coefficient by CF4 from the main TFM table.

name: k_Ar2star_Q_N2_m3_s
description: Ar2* quenching coefficient by N2 from the main TFM table.

name: tau_S_ns
description: Singlet excimer lifetime; nominal value selected from the main TFM table.

name: tau_T_ns
description: Triplet excimer lifetime; nominal value selected from the main TFM table.

name: triplet_weight
description: Nominal secondary output includes singlet plus triplet; CF4 quenching suppresses the slow branch dynamically.

name: scale_Ar2nd
description: Optional global sensitivity scale; the nominal model uses unity.

name: anchor_Ar2nd_to_pure_argon
description: Disabled in the nominal TFM model so the absolute yield follows directly from Degrad populations and literature kinetics.

name: Y_Ar2nd_pure_ph_MeV
description: Legacy optional anchor value retained only for explicit sensitivity studies.

name: reference_pressure_bar
description: Pressure used only if the optional legacy anchor is enabled.

name: reference_additive_fraction
description: Small additive fraction used only if the optional legacy anchor is enabled.

name: pure_argon_fraction_threshold
description: Deprecated numerical threshold; the kinetic model now uses the additive fraction continuously down to pure argon.

name: lambda_Ar2nd_nm
description: Central wavelength of the Ar second continuum.

name: fwhm_Ar2nd_nm
description: Gaussian FWHM used to draw the Ar second-continuum band.

name: Br_CF4_D_to_X
description: Effective CF4+*(D)-to-CF4+(X) branching ratio relative to the ionic UV channel.

name: lambda_CF4_D_to_X_nm
description: Central wavelength of the CF4 ionic VUV branch.

name: fwhm_CF4_D_to_X_nm
description: Gaussian FWHM used to draw the CF4 ionic VUV branch.
